title: GERMANY ROAD TRIP — autumn convertible, castle on hill
prompt: Small open cream convertible on a cobblestone road through south-German autumn vineyards. @young_Papa driving, hands on the steering wheel. @young_Mama in the passenger seat, hair WHIPPING in the wind. Bavarian-style castle on the hilltop in soft background. Right arm POINTS up toward the castle from the passenger seat, mouth GASPS happy. Driver hand GESTURES at the castle in agreement. Adoring glance from the driver. Passenger mouth LAUGHS. young_Mama (excited, pointing): "Look at that castle!" Absolutely NO dialogue, NO voices, NO speech in any language. Only soft music and ambient sound effects (footsteps, leaves, distant traffic). NO foreign-language babble.
